title: デビュー戦の後に・バクシンスタート！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Mmmm... Mmhm!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I can see it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I can see myself running at a speed like never
before, charging down the Bakushin Road!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let us Bakushin with gusto!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First off, what races shall I compete in to ready
myself for the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's me running, so it has to be a G1! The Asahi
Hai Futurity Stakes? Or perhaps the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't have enough experience to debut in a
G1 race yet. For now, she's better off competing
in something like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'd like to hear it!
choice_data_list:
Would you like to try running in the Keio Hai
Junior Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, 1,400 meters?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I'd like to make the Satsuki Sho my first
Classic race! Wouldn't that be way too short by
comparison?!
choice_data_list: Most of the junior-year races are short distance.
Most of the junior-year races are short distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I feel like even 1,400 meters might be
too long for Sakura Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Guh! But, but—
choice_data_list:
As class representative, you must exercise
humility.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Humility?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jumping headfirst into G1 races might seem cool,
but I'm worried some people might keel over in
shock if they see her speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to convince her it would be best to first show
up at the Keio Hai Junior Stakes and gradually let
everyone get used to her speed...
choice_data_list: Don't you think that's the kinder thing to do?
Don't you think that's the kinder thing to do?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I think...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Then for the next race, the goal is to
let the world at large witness my speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In no time, the crowd will be used to chanting
"Whoa, so fast!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One way or another, we decide our next race will
be the Keio Hai Junior Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!
